motto: Near-infinite passive reach. Global pollution cleanup. Always safe on the wire.

reach_model.description: Passive beacon correlation — no transmission. Effective horizon grows with each scan cycle as pollution enters the field; ledger persists forever so nothing slips back in.
reach_model.safety: FCC Part 15 receive-only. We never jam, burst, or transmit. Cleanup is wire-layer: disconnect our station, firewall block, forever registry, dossier archive.
reach_model.horizon_growth: Each cycle extends the correlated field. Cumulative pollution ledger tracks every hostile AP ever seen — global cleanup never forgets.
